<script type="text/javascript">window.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
jQuery( document ).ready(function() {
  const items = document.querySelectorAll(".accordion-item");

  items.forEach(item => {
    const header = item.querySelector(".accordion-header");
    const content = item.querySelector(".accordion-content");

    header.addEventListener("click", () => {
      
      // close others (optional accordion behavior)
      items.forEach(i => {
        if (i !== item) {
          i.querySelector(".accordion-content").style.maxHeight = null;
          i.classList.remove("active");
        }
      });

      // toggle current
      if (content.style.maxHeight) {
        content.style.maxHeight = null;
        item.classList.remove("active");
      } else {
        content.style.maxHeight = content.scrollHeight + "px";
        item.classList.add("active");
      }
    });
  });
	});});</script>
<!-- end Simple Custom CSS and JS -->
<!-- start Simple Custom CSS and JS -->
<script type="text/javascript">
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
  const btn = document.getElementById('btcToggle');
  const section = btn.closest('.btc-section');
  const moreItems = section.querySelectorAll('.btc-more-content');
  const fade = section.querySelector('.btc-fade');

  moreItems.forEach(el => {
    el.style.display = 'none';
  });
  fade.style.display = 'block';

  btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
    const isExpanded = section.classList.toggle('expanded');
    moreItems.forEach(el => {
      el.style.display = isExpanded
        ? (el.tagName === 'LI' ? 'list-item' : 'block')
        : 'none';
    });
    fade.style.display = isExpanded ? 'none' : 'block';
    btn.textContent = isExpanded ? 'Read Less' : 'Read More';
    if (!isExpanded) {
      section.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' });
    }
  });
	
});

</script>
<!-- end Simple Custom CSS and JS -->

</style><div style="display: inline-block"><a href="https://app.thecryptobasic.com/" target="blank"  class="td_spot_img_all"><img width="300" height="250" src="https://thecryptobasic.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/7-Free-Tools-and-much-more.-Sign-Up-Now.png"  alt="spot_img" /></a></div></div><div class="td_block_wrap tdb_single_content tdi_119 td-pb-border-top td_block_template_1 td-post-content tagdiv-type"  data-td-block-uid="tdi_119" >

</style><div class="tdb-block-inner td-fix-index"><p><b>The eagerly-anticipated XLS-30D amendment for the XRPL, set to introduce an Automated Market Maker (AMM), will not launch on Feb. 14, as more validators revoke their votes.</b></p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">This is due to a critical bug discovered in the AMM code. RippleX, the development arm of Ripple, identified the issue during an extended testing, citing a potential obstacle for multiple </span><a href="https://thecryptobasic.com/2024/02/07/sec-adopts-new-crypto-rule-how-could-it-affect-the-upcoming-xrpl-amm/"><span style="font-weight: 400;">AMM</span></a><span style="font-weight: 400;"> transactions executing in the same ledger.</span></p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">The bug primarily affects an edge case where the trading fee is set below 0.01%. In this case, the bug occurs when there is a cluster of transactions on the AMM, causing some transactions to halt for one ledger, resulting in a three to five seconds delay, before execution.</span></p>
<blockquote class="twitter-tweet" data-width="550" data-dnt="true">
<p lang="en" dir="ltr">1/ In extended integration testing to ensure the AMM performs as intended over time, we identified an issue that could prevent multiple AMM txs from executing in the same ledger. We have proposed and are reviewing a fix: <a href="https://t.co/MPMKuI8dDK">https://t.co/MPMKuI8dDK</a></p>
<p>&mdash; RippleX (@RippleXDev) <a href="https://twitter.com/RippleXDev/status/1753152074219704668?ref_src=twsrc%5Etfw">February 1, 2024</a></p></blockquote><div class="td-a-ad id_inline_ad1 id_ad_content-horiz-center"><span class="td-adspot-title"></span><!-- Tag ID: thecryptobasic_incontent_2 -->
<div align="center" data-freestar-ad="__336x280 __336x280" id="thecryptobasic_incontent_2">
  <script data-cfasync="false" type="text/javascript">
    freestar.config.enabled_slots.push({ placementName: "thecryptobasic_incontent_2", slotId: "thecryptobasic_incontent_2" });
  </script>
</div></div>
<p><script data-minify="1" async src="https://thecryptobasic.com/wp-content/cache/min/1/widgets.js?ver=1778745092" charset="utf-8"></script></p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Notably, once the AMM is created, the transactions must wait for one ledger to close before execution. After this ledger closes, the transactions execute normally, except for the AMMvote transaction.</span></p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Notably, the first AMMvote transaction would execute correctly, but the AMMvote transactions that follow will continue to wait for one ledger to close within three to five seconds before execution.</span></p><div class="td-a-ad id_inline_ad2 id_ad_content-horiz-center"><span class="td-adspot-title"></span><!-- Tag ID: thecryptobasic_incontent_3 -->
<div align="center" data-freestar-ad="__320x100 __500x90" id="thecryptobasic_incontent_3">
  <script data-cfasync="false" type="text/javascript">
    freestar.config.enabled_slots.push({ placementName: "thecryptobasic_incontent_3", slotId: "thecryptobasic_incontent_3" });
  </script>
</div></div>
<p><a href="https://thecryptobasic.com/2023/09/07/ripplex-announces-latest-version-of-xrp-ledger-xrpl-rippled-1-12-0/"><span style="font-weight: 400;">RippleX</span></a><span style="font-weight: 400;"> has proposed a fix, and is currently reviewing it. The proposed fix addresses the issue, ensuring correct identification of default fields within AMM inner objects and reinforcing stability in both the core ledger and AMM code.</span></p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Despite the relatively minor impact of the bug, XRPL validators have taken a stand by revoking their votes on the XLS-30D amendment. Recall that </span><a href="https://thecryptobasic.com/2024/02/01/xrp-holders-can-now-earn-passive-income-as-amm-amendment-finally-passes/"><span style="font-weight: 400;">the amendment reached the required validator consensus</span></a><span style="font-weight: 400;"> on Feb. 1, with implementation ETA at Feb. 14.</span></p>
<h2><span style="font-weight: 400;">XRPL Validators Revoke Yes Votes</span></h2>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Vet, a prominent XRPL validator, expressed concern about the potential negative image implementing a feature with a bug might cast on the XRPL’s reputation.</span></p>
<blockquote class="twitter-tweet" data-width="550" data-dnt="true">
<p lang="en" dir="ltr">I withdraw my vote for the XRP ledger Automated Market Maker.</p>
<p>The AMM edge case effect is very minor and will not cause an issues based on what we know right now, that didn&#39;t change and my opinion about it hasn&#39;t either.</p>
<p>On the other hand is not reflective of the image of the…</p>
<p>&mdash; Vet ?‍☠️ (@Vet_X0) <a href="https://twitter.com/Vet_X0/status/1755180801208009190?ref_src=twsrc%5Etfw">February 7, 2024</a></p></blockquote>
<p><script data-minify="1" async src="https://thecryptobasic.com/wp-content/cache/min/1/widgets.js?ver=1778745092" charset="utf-8"></script></p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">The validator operator reflected on a similar situation with the XLS-20D amendment, emphasizing the importance of a flawless launch for such a critical feature and advocated for the fix to be implemented before </span><a href="https://thecryptobasic.com/2022/11/30/ripplex-launches-testing-for-xrpl-native-amm/"><span style="font-weight: 400;">the implementation of the AMM</span></a><span style="font-weight: 400;">.</span></p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">xSpectar, another validator, echoed this sentiment, emphasizing the critical nature of the feature and the need to address known issues before activation. The NFT project advocated for the community to uphold the highest standards for the XRPL.</span></p>
<blockquote class="twitter-tweet" data-width="550" data-dnt="true">
<p lang="en" dir="ltr">After careful (re)consideration we’ve changed our vote on the AMM amendment to Nay</p>
<p>It’s a critical feature, there is a known issue, we need to fix first before activating.</p>
<p>Voting otherwise would be irresponsible and compromise our integrity and it would be a dangerous… <a href="https://t.co/K0WkCaKdGn">https://t.co/K0WkCaKdGn</a></p>
<p>&mdash; xSPECTAR ™ (@xSPECTAR) <a href="https://twitter.com/xSPECTAR/status/1755204953507803140?ref_src=twsrc%5Etfw">February 7, 2024</a></p></blockquote>
<p><script data-minify="1" async src="https://thecryptobasic.com/wp-content/cache/min/1/widgets.js?ver=1778745092" charset="utf-8"></script></p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">The official </span><a href="https://thecryptobasic.com/2023/07/07/xspectar-considers-leaving-xrpl-due-to-lack-of-support-from-ripple-xrp-community-reacts/"><span style="font-weight: 400;">xSpectar</span></a><span style="font-weight: 400;"> account stressed that it is the responsibility of validators to avoid setting a dangerous precedent by allowing amendments with known issues to pass.</span></p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Daniel, CTO at Eminence and operator of the Eminence validator, took a principled stand by withdrawing his vote on the proposed AMM amendment. He cited concerns about compromising the integrity of best practices and setting a dangerous precedent.</span></p>
<blockquote class="twitter-tweet" data-width="550" data-dnt="true">
<p lang="en" dir="ltr">I have decided to withdraw my vote on the proposed AMM amendment. After careful consideration and discussion within our community, the proposed feature, as it stands, goes against the best practices we strive to uphold.</p>
<p>Specifically, my concern lies in releasing a feature with a…</p>
<p>&mdash; Daniel &quot;No&quot; Keller (@daniel_wwf) <a href="https://twitter.com/daniel_wwf/status/1755208209550180450?ref_src=twsrc%5Etfw">February 7, 2024</a></p></blockquote>
<p><script data-minify="1" async src="https://thecryptobasic.com/wp-content/cache/min/1/widgets.js?ver=1778745092" charset="utf-8"></script></p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Daniel emphasized the importance of prioritizing stability and functionality, even if it meant delaying the feature. He suggested deprecating the current AMM and introducing AMMv2 with fixes for consideration.</span></p>
<h2><span style="font-weight: 400;">XLS-30D Amendment Below 80% Consensus</span></h2>
<p><a href="https://thecryptobasic.com/2024/01/31/xrpl-labs-founder-says-xrp-wallet-cannot-rug/"><span style="font-weight: 400;">XRPL Labs</span></a><span style="font-weight: 400;">, the development team behind Xaman, have also rescinded their Yes vote. As of press time, the validator consensus has declined to 71.43%, below the required 80% consensus. As a result, the amendment will not pass.</span></p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Meanwhile, most validators, including Ripple, Bithomp, XRPScan, Alloy Networks, Bitrue and 20 others, have retained their support. XRPGoat, another dUNL validator, </span><a href="https://twitter.com/XrpGoat/status/1755206150176321950?t=2BlcFxaGtSM3TbgjjaZHLg&amp;s=19" target="_blank" rel="nofollow noopener"><span style="font-weight: 400;">suggested</span></a><span style="font-weight: 400;"> that the AMM could be deployed since the bug is minor, advocating for a fix while the feature runs.</span></p>
<div class="td-a-ad id_bottom_ad "><span class="td-adspot-title"></span><!-- Tag ID: thecryptobasic_incontent_bottom -->

                        /* global jQuery:{} */
                        jQuery().ready( function () {

                            var blockUid = 'tdi_13',
                                $blockObj = jQuery('.tdi_13'),
                                modalUid = 'td_m_47ce',
                                $modalObj = $blockObj.find('.tdm-popup-modal-wrap'),
                                show_modal_in_composer = 'yes';

                            if( $modalObj.length && modalUid !== '' ) {
                                var tdPopupModalItem = new tdPopupModal.item(),
                                    $triggerBtnObj = $blockObj.find('> .tds-button > a.tdm-btn');

                                // modal uid
                                tdPopupModalItem.uid = modalUid;
                                // block uid
                                tdPopupModalItem.blockUid = blockUid;
                                // modal object
                                tdPopupModalItem.modalObj = $modalObj;
                                // modal object
                                tdPopupModalItem.closeModals = [];
                                // modal open position
                                tdPopupModalItem._modal_open_position = 'over-screen';
                                // modal open disable site scroll
                                tdPopupModalItem._site_scroll = '1';

                                // check to see whether we are in composer or not
                                                                    // we are not in composer

                                    // trigger button object
                                    if( $triggerBtnObj.length ) {
                                        tdPopupModalItem.triggerBtnObj = $triggerBtnObj;
                                    }

                                    // trigger types
                                    tdPopupModalItem._modal_trigger_types = {"button":[]};

                                    // modal content load
                                    tdPopupModalItem._modal_content_load = '';

                                    
                                
                                tdPopupModal.addItem(tdPopupModalItem);

                            }

                        });

                        /* global jQuery:{} */
                        jQuery().ready( function () {

                            var blockUid = 'tdi_65',
                                $blockObj = jQuery('.tdi_65'),
                                modalUid = 'td_m_3e17',
                                $modalObj = $blockObj.find('.tdm-popup-modal-wrap'),
                                show_modal_in_composer = 'yes';

                            if( $modalObj.length && modalUid !== '' ) {
                                var tdPopupModalItem = new tdPopupModal.item(),
                                    $triggerBtnObj = $blockObj.find('> .tds-button > a.tdm-btn');

                                // modal uid
                                tdPopupModalItem.uid = modalUid;
                                // block uid
                                tdPopupModalItem.blockUid = blockUid;
                                // modal object
                                tdPopupModalItem.modalObj = $modalObj;
                                // modal object
                                tdPopupModalItem.closeModals = [];
                                // modal open position
                                tdPopupModalItem._modal_open_position = 'over-screen';
                                // modal open disable site scroll
                                tdPopupModalItem._site_scroll = '1';

                                // check to see whether we are in composer or not
                                                                    // we are not in composer

                                    // trigger button object
                                    if( $triggerBtnObj.length ) {
                                        tdPopupModalItem.triggerBtnObj = $triggerBtnObj;
                                    }

                                    // trigger types
                                    tdPopupModalItem._modal_trigger_types = {"button":[]};

                                    // modal content load
                                    tdPopupModalItem._modal_content_load = '';

                                    
                                
                                tdPopupModal.addItem(tdPopupModalItem);

                            }

                        });

                    
                    

            
                jQuery(window).on( 'load', function () {
                    var block = jQuery('.tdi_117'),
                        blockClass = '.tdi_117',
                        blockInner = block.find('.tdb-block-inner'),
                        blockOffsetLeft;

                    if( block.find('audio').length > 0 ) {
                        jQuery(blockClass + ' audio').mediaelementplayer();
                    }

                    if( block.hasClass('tdb-sfi-stretch') ) {
                        jQuery(window).resize(function () {
                            blockOffsetLeft = block.offset().left;

                            if( block.hasClass('tdb-sfi-stretch-left') ) {
                                blockInner.css('margin-left', -blockOffsetLeft + 'px');
                            } else {
                                blockInner.css('margin-right', -(jQuery(window).width() - (blockOffsetLeft + block.outerWidth())) + 'px');
                            }
                        });
                        jQuery(window).resize();
                    }

                    setTimeout(function () {
                        block.css('opacity', 1);
                    }, 500);
                });
